name: Nemotron Inference Cost Monitor
description: Daily rollup of Nemotron token spend per module from AI Log table. Alerts if spend exceeds thresholds and identifies prompt inefficiency.

config.description: Calculate daily inference costs per module
config.code: const records = inputData.records || []; const costPerToken = 0.0001; const modules = { MODULE_A: { calls: 0, est_tokens: 0 }, MODULE_B: { calls: 0, est_tokens: 0 }, MODULE_C: { calls: 0, est_tokens: 0 } }; records.forEach(r => { const mod = r.module || 'MODULE_A'; if (modules[mod]) { modules[mod].calls++; modules[mod].est_tokens += (r.input_brief?.length || 0) + (r.output_text?.length || 0); } }); const totalCalls = Object.values(modules).reduce((s, m) => s + m.calls, 0); const totalTokens = Object.values(modules).reduce((s, m) => s + m.est_tokens, 0); const estCost = (totalTokens * costPerToken).toFixed(2); const threshold = 50; output = { modules, total_calls: totalCalls, total_est_tokens: totalTokens, est_cost_usd: estCost, over_threshold: parseFloat(estCost) > threshold, threshold_usd: threshold, date: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] };

config.message: DAILY INFERENCE REPORT | {{step2.date}} | Calls: {{step2.total_calls}} | Est Cost: ${{step2.est_cost_usd}} | A: {{step2.modules.MODULE_A.calls}} | B: {{step2.modules.MODULE_B.calls}} | C: {{step2.modules.MODULE_C.calls}}{{step2.over_threshold ? ' | OVER THRESHOLD' : ''}}
COST ALERT: Daily inference spend ${{step2.est_cost_usd}} exceeds ${{step2.threshold_usd}} threshold. Review prompt efficiency.
